About Us
Erode's Most Trusted Bakery Equipment Maker

Aameena Tinker Works is a trusted manufacturer of premium bakery trays, baking moulds, burger pans, muffin trays, heart-shaped moulds, and customized baking equipment based in Erode, Tamil Nadu.

Since 2012, we have been serving bakeries, food production units, and commercial kitchens with durable, precision-engineered products designed for superior baking performance and consistent results.

Our commitment to quality craftsmanship, food-grade materials, and customized manufacturing solutions has made us a preferred partner for bakeries across India. Every product is built for long service life and excellent heat distribution.

🔩 Precision Engineering 🍃 Food Grade Materials 🎨 Custom Sizes 🛡️ Quality Certified 🚚 Pan India Delivery
💬 WhatsApp Us 📞 Call Now
Our Products
Complete Bakery Tray & Mould Range
All products are available in custom sizes and can be ordered with Teflon coating. Send your enquiry via WhatsApp for a quick quote.
Why Choose Us
Built for Bakery Professionals
🔧

Precision Engineering

Every tray is fabricated with exacting standards for consistent shape, size, and heat distribution across every batch.

🌿

Food Grade Quality

All materials are food-safe and comply with standards for direct food contact — safe for your products and customers.

🚚

Pan India Delivery

We reliably ship to bakeries, food factories, and commercial kitchens anywhere across India.

📐

Custom Sizes

Manufacture to your exact dimensions — bring your drawings or dimensions and we'll produce a perfect fit.

💰

Competitive Pricing

Direct-from-factory pricing with no middlemen. Bulk order discounts available for large bakeries and distributors.

✨

Teflon Coating

Optional professional-grade Teflon coating for non-stick performance, easier release, and extended product life.

🤝

Reliable Support

Responsive customer support via WhatsApp and phone from our experienced team — Mon to Sat, 9AM–7:30PM.

🏭

14+ Years Experience

Since 2012, we have been a trusted partner for hundreds of bakeries, food units, and commercial kitchens.
